title: Day 51 - Kanji Practice
html:
Day 51 - Kanji Practice

Please download today's kanji practice here: Kanji Practice Day 51.pdf

Practising writing kanji every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

Refer back to the Week 11 - Kanji lesson to watch how to do the correct stroke order for the 朝, 昼 & 夜 kanji.
